site.name: Islam.wiki
site.description: The most comprehensive Islamic knowledge base. Quran with tafsir, authentic Hadith with isnad analysis, scholar biographies, classical books, and encyclopedic articles. Multilingual. Scholar-verified. Free forever.
site.ogDescription: Quran, Hadith, Seerah, classical books, and encyclopedic articles. Free forever.

home.quranDesc: The word of God, revealed to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Start with Al-Fatiha — the opening chapter.
home.hadithDesc: The Prophet's sayings and actions. Start with Sahih al-Bukhari — the most authentic collection.
home.seerahDesc: The biography of the Prophet — his life, character, and mission over 23 years.
home.askDesc: Have a question about Islam? Get a thoughtful, scholarly answer from ChatIslam.
home.wikiDesc: Community-edited encyclopedia of Islamic concepts, terminology, and encyclopedic topics.
home.apiDesc: Free access to Quran, Hadith, and Islamic content for your app or website. No API key required for basic use.
